OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF
filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
zero out capacity on deactivated links
Save Hourly Capacity (multiplied by period length later)

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set EA Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach VDF function

OPERATION.MESSAGES: Demand segment eaheavytruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment eamedtruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment easr2: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal.
OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 2 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 6.75138462e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set AM Peak Link Capacities

OPERATION.COMMENT: filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
zero out capacity on deactivated links
Save Hourly Capacity (multiplied by period length later)

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set AM Peak Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach VDF function

OPERATION.MESSAGES: Demand segment amheavytruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment ammedtruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment amsr2: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal.
OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 57 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 9.78580100e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF
filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
zero out capacity on deactivated links
Save Hourly Capacity (multiplied by period length later)

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set MD Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach VDF function

OPERATION.MESSAGES: Demand segment mdheavytruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment mdmedtruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment mdsr2: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal.
OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 8 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 6.61058440e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set PM Peak Link Capacities

OPERATION.COMMENT: filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
zero out capacity on deactivated links
Save Hourly Capacity (multiplied by period length later)

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set PM Peak Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach VDF function

OPERATION.MESSAGES: Demand segment pmheavytruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment pmmedtruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment pmsr2: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal.
OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 57 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 9.78580100e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: !!! OPTIONAL !!! save original values of attributes that will be changed; should only be run on unassigned network
flag nodes on met net links
set type number to 51 for approach VDF

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set AM Peak Link Capacities

OPERATION.COMMENT: filter for all metered ramps and links
reset ramp type numbers to original values
set ramp capacity assuming no meter
reset ramp lengths to actual values
set type number to 71 for metered ramp VDF
set type number to 61 for CBD grid VDF
zero out capacity on deactivated links
Save Hourly Capacity (multiplied by period length later)

GROUPPARA.NAME: Group Set EV Toll Time Values

OPERATION.COMMENT: multiply hourly capacity by number of hours in period
multiply midblock capacity by number of hours in period (x1 for MD)
set AddVal3 = Period MBCap for custom approach VDF function

OPERATION.MESSAGES: Demand segment evheavytruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment evmedtruck: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal. Demand segment evsr2: There is no demand for any OD relation outside the diagonal.
OPERATION.RESULTMESSAGE: The assignment reached convergence after 38 of a maximum of 200 iterations with GAP of 8.30297094e-04.

OPERATION.COMMENT: Average AM Volume MSA with AM Volume Iter N
Average MD Volume MSA with OP Volume Iter N
Calculate AM MSA TT for Skimming (AddVal1)
Calculate MD MSA TT for Skimming (AddVal2)
Save vol_msa fields for next iteration
Network Prep for Skimming: Default Times, LINKSERIAL, and Default TSysSet on Connectors
